Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class WebViewCore

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Core runtime implementation of IWebView over a platform adapter.

public sealed class WebViewCore : ISpaHostingWebView, IWebView, IDisposable
Inheritance
object
WebViewCore
Implements
ISpaHostingWebView
IWebView
IDisposable

Methods

AddPreloadScriptAsync(string)

Registers a JavaScript snippet to run at document start on every page load.

public Task<string> AddPreloadScriptAsync(string javaScript)

Parameters

javaScript string

The script to inject.

Returns

Task<string>

An opaque script ID that can be passed to RemovePreloadScriptAsync(string).

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement Agibuild.Fulora.Adapters.Abstractions.IPreloadScriptAdapter.

public Task<byte[]> CaptureScreenshotAsync()

Returns

Task<byte[]>

CloseDevToolsAsync() 

public Task CloseDevToolsAsync()

Returns

Task

CreateDefault(IWebViewDispatcher)

Creates a new IWebView using the default platform adapter for the current OS. This is the recommended entry-point; callers never need to reference the internal adapter types.

public static IWebView CreateDefault(IWebViewDispatcher dispatcher)

Parameters

dispatcher IWebViewDispatcher

Returns

IWebView

CreateDefault(IWebViewDispatcher, ILogger<WebViewCore>) 

public static IWebView CreateDefault(IWebViewDispatcher dispatcher, ILogger<WebViewCore> logger)

Parameters

dispatcher IWebViewDispatcher
logger ILogger<WebViewCore>

Returns

IWebView

DisableWebMessageBridge() 

public void DisableWebMessageBridge()

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

EnableSpaHosting(SpaHostingOptions)

Enables SPA hosting. Registers the custom scheme, subscribes to WebResourceRequested, and optionally auto-enables the bridge.

public void EnableSpaHosting(SpaHostingOptions options)

Parameters

options SpaHostingOptions

EnableWebMessageBridge(WebMessageBridgeOptions) 

public void EnableWebMessageBridge(WebMessageBridgeOptions options)

Parameters

options WebMessageBridgeOptions

FindInPageAsync(string, FindInPageOptions?)

Searches the current page for the given text.

public Task<FindInPageResult> FindInPageAsync(string text, FindInPageOptions? options = null)

Parameters

text string

The search text. Must not be null or empty.

options FindInPageOptions

Optional search options (case sensitivity, direction).

Returns

Task<FindInPageResult>

A FindInPageResult with match count and active index.

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement Agibuild.Fulora.Adapters.Abstractions.IFindInPageAdapter.

ArgumentException

text is null or empty.

GetZoomFactorAsync()

Gets or sets the zoom factor (1.0 = 100%). Clamped to [0.25, 5.0]. Returns 1.0 if the adapter does not support zoom.

public Task<double> GetZoomFactorAsync()

Returns

Task<double>

RemovePreloadScriptAsync(string)

Removes a previously registered preload script by its ID.

public Task RemovePreloadScriptAsync(string scriptId)

Parameters

scriptId string

The ID returned by AddPreloadScriptAsync(string).

Returns

Task

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement Agibuild.Fulora.Adapters.Abstractions.IPreloadScriptAdapter.

SetCustomUserAgent(string?)

Sets the custom User-Agent string at runtime. Pass null to revert to the platform default.

public void SetCustomUserAgent(string? userAgent)

Parameters

userAgent string

StopFindInPageAsync(bool)

Clears find-in-page highlights and resets search state.

public Task StopFindInPageAsync(bool clearHighlights = true)

Parameters

clearHighlights bool

Whether to remove visual highlights. Default: true.

Returns

Task

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement Agibuild.Fulora.Adapters.Abstractions.IFindInPageAdapter.

ICookieManager

TryGetWebViewHandle()

Compatibility wrapper around TryGetWebViewHandleAsync() for synchronous call sites. Prefer using TryGetWebViewHandleAsync() to avoid blocking.

public INativeHandle? TryGetWebViewHandle()

Returns

INativeHandle

TryGetWebViewHandleAsync()

Asynchronously retrieves the native platform WebView handle. This is the primary any-thread API surface and always marshals adapter access to the UI thread.

public Task<INativeHandle?> TryGetWebViewHandleAsync()

Returns

Task<INativeHandle>
